**Internal Deal Memo**

Project Codename: Operation Sapphire

Date: 15 October 2023

To: Board of Directors  
From: Mr. Jonathan Lim, Head of M&A  
Contact: +65 6123 4567  
Email: jonathan.lim@fictitiouscorp.sg  

Subject: Preliminary Approval for Acquisition of Emerald Tech Pte. Ltd.

We are considering the acquisition of Emerald Tech Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T23LL0001A) as part of our strategic expansion into the AI sector. The proposed transaction value is approximately SGD 75 million. Dr. Stella Tan, lead negotiator, has been in discussions with their management team. As part of due diligence, we have reviewed financials and foresee significant synergies.

Please review the attached documents for further details. Your feedback by 22 October 2023 would be appreciated. For confidentiality, please reference the NRIC S8765432D when discussing internally.

Thank you for your attention.

Best regards,  
Mr. Jonathan Lim
